title: [CI:DOCS]add return info for prereview
body:
begin to add return info and status codes for errors so that we can
review the apiv2

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
although I don't really understand what is going on.  I figure this is just input to a tool that describes what the return codes are when generating API.

> LGTM
> although I don't really understand what is going on. I figure this is just input to a tool that describes what the return codes are when generating API.

It is an intermediate step for tool input yes.  I havent figured out how the tooling quite works yet so I just took the time to record it and somewhat verify that we are doing the right things.
